prompt: Recruiting caught two embarrassments in the offer-letter tooling and I need them gone before Friday's batch. One: merged letters still contain raw {{candidate}} and {{salary}} tokens — but only the later mentions; the greeting comes out fine, then the signature block literally says "Welcome aboard, {{candidate}}!". I suspected the placeholder scanner, but missingPlaceholders() sees every token just fine, so it's not that. Two: the redaction pass we run before letters go into the recruiting deck masks names perfectly, yet the candidate's email and the actual comp number — "$185,000", right there — sail through untouched. Legal is unamused. `node --test test_merge.ts` reproduces both. Fix merge.ts and show me green; the tests stay as they are.
